name: Luann and Sonja: Welcome to Crappie Lake
original_name: Luann and Sonja: Welcome to Crappie Lake
overview: The Benton City Council surprises the town residents by inviting “Real Housewives” icons Luann de Lesseps and Sonja Morgan to help spruce up their small town that was devastated by the pandemic, which has a population just shy of 7,000.

trailers.title: Your First Look at Luann & Sonja: Welcome to Crappie Lake | Crappie Lake Sneak Peek | Bravo
